title: rubus leightonii
intro: Rubus leightonii, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Leighton's Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus leightonii include its potential to support heart health, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Rubus leightonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a variety of health concerns.
